Home.title: To get started, edit the page.tsx file.
Home.intro: Try the <chat>chat UI demo</chat>. Looking for a starting point or more instructions? Head over to <templates>Templates</templates> or the <learn>Learning</learn> center.

Chat.blurb: Multi-step agents assemble an answer from indexed reference entries (fetch → answer → review → final). You may optionally select the primary person the pipeline should lean on from filtered candidates.
Chat.blurbShort: Grounded answers. Optionally pick a primary philosopher above.
Chat.loading: Processing: fetching reference entries, then answer, review, and final pass (this can take dozens of seconds)…
Chat.reviewWarning: The automatic review did not fully pass. Treat the answer with care.
Chat.placeholder: Ask about philosophers’ views, definitions, or philosophical topics…
Chat.sendShortcutHint: ⌘+Enter or Ctrl+Enter to send. Enter for a new line.
